description_long: This is a compact, rectangular couch with a visibly blocky structure and a solid, box-like base. The upholstery appears to be a mix of light and dark tones, with the seat and backrest areas showing a lighter, possibly fabric or faux leather material, while the sides and base are darker, suggesting a different material or a shadowed effect. The couch features two prominent seat cushions and a continuous backrest, both of which seem integrated into the main frame. The armrests are short and squared, matching the overall geometric design of the couch. The legs are not clearly visible, possibly hidden or integrated into the base, giving the couch a grounded appearance. There are no visible accent pillows or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian, urban style.
description: A compact, blocky couch with integrated seat and back cushions, light upholstery, and squared armrests. The design is simple and utilitarian, with a solid, grounded base.
description_view_0: The underside and back of the couch are visible, showing the blocky base and some exposed structural elements.
description_view_1: Side profile reveals the thickness of the armrest and the continuous seat and backrest, with a clear view of the couch's depth.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlights the flat, rectangular seat and backrest, with the armrests barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1, showing the other armrest and the solid base.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two integrated seat cushions and a continuous backrest, all attached and flush with the frame; no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery appears solid with no visible patterns, featuring a matte, slightly textured surface.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible, likely hidden or integrated into the base, giving a low-profile, grounded look.
attribute_armrest_design: Short, squared armrests that are the same height as the seat back, with no visible padding or decorative features.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, attached backrest that is medium height and flush with the seat cushions, with no visible tufting or division.
